prompt: Photorealistic editorial portrait of a single woman, head and shoulders, front three-quarter angle. She is 32 years old with warm golden-olive sun-kissed skin and light natural freckles across the nose and cheeks (same warm skin family), looser salt-textured mid-length waves, a slightly rounder face, full lips, calm self-possessed expression looking just past the camera, a little candid and undone, minimal natural makeup. Realistic skin texture and visible pores, no heavy retouching, true-to-life color, shot on an 85mm lens at f4. Natural healthy Mediterranean look. High detail.
